templateInputs.goal: test whether hydration breaks feel worth the interruption
templateInputs.successSignal: Voters give one concrete reason about safety, fairness, rhythm, tactics, or commercials.

question.title: Are World Cup hydration breaks worth the interruption?
question.description: Vote up if planned hydration breaks make World Cup matches safer or fairer enough to justify pausing play. Vote down if they disrupt rhythm too much or feel unnecessary. Feedback: one reason.
